reasoning: The Brooklyn Nets are currently rebuilding and have the longest odds in the league to win the Eastern Conference for the 2025-26 season (+50000 on sportsbooks, which equates to an implied probability of less than 0.2%). They recently had five first-round draft picks in the 2025 NBA draft and their season win total is projected to be the lowest in the league, firmly cementing them as a bottom-tier team in a complete rebuilding phase. Factoring in the bounds for forecasting (0.05 minimum), the probability of them winning the Eastern Conference is at the minimum allowed limit.
